column66: Jul 7: Wolf (back) is out for Monday's California Classic Summer League Game against the Warriors Blue, Erik Slater of ClutchPoints.com reports.
Jul 8: Gardner (ankle) won't participate in the Las Vegas Summer League, per Ira Winderman of the South Florida Sun Sentinel.
Jul 7: Ryan (undisclosed) did not play in Monday's 95-89 California Classic Summer League loss to the Kings.
Jul 7: Boozer (rest) won't play in Tuesday's Salt Lake City Summer League game against the Hawks, Michael Wallace of the Grizzlies' official site reports.
Jul 6: Essengue (shoulder) said Monday's he's planning to play in the Vegas Summer League, Joel Lorenzi of The Athletic reports.
Jul 8: Mara (undisclosed) didn't play in Tuesday's 103-69 Salt Lake City Summer League loss to the Jazz.

Jul 1: Sorber underwent a successful minor arthroscopic procedure on his right knee Wednesday and will return to full basketball activities in approximately four weeks, Clemente Almanza of USA Today reports.
Jul 5: Clayton won't play during Summer League in Salt Lake City due to a mild right knee sprain, Michael Wallace of the Grizzlies' official site reports.
Jun 25: Hepburn (knee) will sign his two-way qualifying offer to return to the Raptors next season, per Michael Scotto of USA Today.

Jul 7: Lakers' California Classic Summer League head coach Ty Abbott said Thiero took a hard fall during Sunday's loss to the Heat, so he held him out of Monday's win over the Spurs, Thuc Nhi Nguyen of the Los Angeles Times reports.
Jul 8: Stirtz (undisclosed) didn't play in Tuesday's 103-69 Salt Lake City Summer League loss to the Jazz.
Jul 5: Lopez won't suit up for Summer League in Salt Lake City due to a mild left hamstring strain, Michael Wallace of the Grizzlies' official site reports.
Jul 8: Oweh didn't play in Tuesday's 103-69 Salt Lake City Summer League loss to the Jazz and was seen with a walking boot on his left leg, Justin Martinez of The Oklahoman reports.
Jul 8: Mara (undisclosed) didn't play in Tuesday's 103-69 Salt Lake City Summer League loss to the Jazz.
